whatIsStandX.title: A Perpetuals DEX designed for clarity, speed, and continuous learning
whatIsStandX.sentenceOne: StandX is a decentralized exchange for perpetual contracts, where you can trade market direction through long and short positions.
whatIsStandX.sentenceTwo: Instead of letting funds sit idle, StandX connects your collateral flow with DUSD utility in a way that is easier to understand than most platforms.
whatIsStandX.sentenceThree: This hub gives newcomers a simple path to understand the product fast, without assuming deep DeFi background.

perpetuals.title: Perpetual contracts
perpetuals.description: Trade price movement without expiry dates, with clear risk awareness.

dusd.title: DUSD stablecoin
dusd.description: DUSD is the native stablecoin reference across the StandX experience.

selfCustody.title: Self-custody by default
selfCustody.description: Your wallet remains your access layer while you interact with the DEX.

whyTradeHere.title: Three reasons traders keep coming back to StandX
whyTradeHere.subtitle: You get a focused Trading environment, DUSD utility that supports better planning, and decentralized architecture that keeps control in user hands.

perpetualContracts.title: Perpetual Contracts
perpetualContracts.description: Execute long and short strategies with a UI made for decision speed, not noise.

dusdYield.title: DUSD Yield Gains
dusdYield.description: Understand how DUSD supports yield flow so idle periods can still stay productive.

decentralizedSecure.title: Decentralized & Secure
decentralizedSecure.description: Keep wallet-level ownership while participating in a transparent DEX environment.

dusdSpotlight.title: Why DUSD matters before any yield number
dusdSpotlight.description: DUSD is not a side feature. It is the native stablecoin context that helps users understand collateral flow, risk pacing, and how yield is generated across trading activity.
dusdSpotlight.callout: Know the stablecoin first. Yield comes after understanding.

panel.title: DUSD in practical terms
panel.pointOne: DUSD gives users a stablecoin reference while interacting with perpetual markets.
panel.pointTwo: Yield potential is easier to evaluate when DUSD behavior is clear in your workflow.
panel.pointThree: Learning DUSD mechanics first helps reduce emotional, overleveraged decisions.

howItWorksPage.title: How StandX works in three practical steps
howItWorksPage.description: This flow is built for first-time users. You will see where perpetuals Trading, DUSD, and yield fit together before taking unnecessary risk.

connect.title: Connect your wallet
connect.description: Use your preferred wallet to access the StandX interface.
connect.whyItMatters: Your wallet is your account layer, so you stay in control of access and permissions.

deposit.title: Deposit collateral and understand DUSD
deposit.description: Prepare capital flow and get familiar with DUSD before opening leverage.
deposit.whyItMatters: When DUSD mechanics are clear, position sizing and risk pacing become easier to manage.

trade.title: Trade perpetuals and monitor yield flow
trade.description: Open long or short positions, then track performance with discipline.
trade.whyItMatters: Good execution combines entry quality, leverage control, and consistent review.

terms.title: Quick glossary before you trade
terms.subtitle: These terms appear often in DeFi and Perpetuals conversations. Understand them now to reduce confusion later.

perpetuals.label: Perpetuals
perpetuals.definition: Contracts that let you trade price direction without an expiry date.

collateral.label: Collateral
collateral.definition: Funds backing your position. If risk rises too much, this balance is at stake.

yield.label: Yield
yield.definition: Return generated over time from activity and market mechanics inside the protocol.

risk.label: Leverage and risk
risk.definition: Leverage can amplify gains and losses. Treat sizing rules as non-negotiable.

finalBlock.title: Need help while you explore?
finalBlock.description: The StandX community can guide setup questions, platform navigation, and practical next steps for new users.
